desc.gu: ઘર ની છત — ૧kW–10kW on-grid. ૯૦% bill ઘટ. Net metering — extra units ગ્રિડ ને વેચ.
desc.en: 1kW–10kW on-grid rooftop. Reduce electricity bill by 90%. Sell extra units via net metering.

desc.gu: PM-KUSUM Yojana — ૬૦–૯૦% Subsidy. Solar Water Pump — ૨૪/7 ફ્રી irrigation.
desc.en: PM-KUSUM Yojana — 60–90% subsidy on solar water pumps. Free irrigation 24/7.

desc.gu: Factory, Shop, School — ઊંચો energy bill ઘટ. On-grid / Hybrid / Off-grid available.
desc.en: Factory, shop, school — cut heavy energy bills. On-grid / hybrid / off-grid systems.

desc.gu: Team ઘરે — Site, Shadow & System size analysis.
desc.en: Team visits — site, shadow & system size analysis.

desc.gu: Custom design, cost, saving & subsidy calculation.
desc.en: Custom design, cost, savings & subsidy calculation.

desc.gu: DISCOM + PM Surya Ghar — Paperwork Skylar India.
desc.en: DISCOM & PM Surya Ghar — all paperwork by Skylar India.

desc.gu: Certified team — 1–3 days professional install + net meter.
desc.en: Certified team, 1–3 days install + net meter commissioning.

desc.gu: Subsidy bank account. System live. Lifetime AMC & support.
desc.en: Subsidy credited, system live. Lifetime AMC & 24/7 support.

q.en: How much does solar installation cost?

a.gu: 3kW subsidy પહેલા ₹1.6–2.15 lakh. PM Surya Ghar ₹78,000 subsidy પછી ₹82,000–1.07 lakh. EMI ₹300/month possible. 1kW: ₹30K | 2kW: ₹60K | 3kW+: ₹78K.
a.en: 3kW costs ₹1.6–2.15 lakh before subsidy. After PM Surya Ghar ₹78,000, net cost ₹82,000–1.07 lakh. EMI from ₹300/month.

q.en: How to apply PM Surya Ghar in Gujarat?

a.gu: pmsuryaghar.gov.in — UGVCL/PGVCL/DGVCL consumer number register. Skylar India free-of-charge full application handle. 30 days bank account subsidy.
a.en: Register at pmsuryaghar.gov.in with DISCOM consumer number. Skylar India handles all paperwork free. Subsidy credited within 30 days.

a.gu: Gujarat 300+ sunny days — 3kW avg 12–15 units/day (360–450/month). ₹7–8/unit = ₹2,500–3,500 monthly saving. Annual saving ₹30,000–42,000.
a.en: Gujarat has 300+ sunny days. 3kW generates 12–15 units/day (360–450/month), saving ₹2,500–3,500/month or ₹30,000–42,000/year.

a.gu: On-grid (subsidy with): 3–5 yr. Off-grid/battery: 5–7 yr. ત્યારબાદ 20+ yr ફ્રી electricity. 25 yr total savings ₹5–10 lakh+.
a.en: On-grid with subsidy: 3–5 year payback. Off-grid: 5–7 years. Then 20+ years free electricity. Total 25-year savings ₹5–10 lakh+.

a.gu: PM-KUSUM Component-B: Central 30% + State 30% = 60% (3–10HP). Small/Marginal farmers 90% સુધી. Diesel vs Solar ₹50,000–1,00,000+/yr saving.
a.en: PM-KUSUM: Central 30% + State 30% = 60% on solar pumps (3–10HP). Small/marginal farmers up to 90%. Annual savings vs diesel: ₹50,000–1,00,000+.

a.gu: Panel cleaning: ₹500–1,000/yr. Inverter check: ₹1,000–2,000/yr. Skylar India AMC available. Panels 25 yr 80%+ efficiency maintain.
a.en: Panel cleaning: ₹500–1,000/year. Inverter check: ₹1,000–2,000. Skylar India AMC packages available. Panels maintain 80%+ efficiency for 25 years.

q.en: Does solar work on cloudy/rainy days?

a.gu: Cloudy: 10–25% reduced. Gujarat 300+ sunny days — annual excellent. On-grid: grid backup. Hybrid: battery. Net metering rainy season credit.
a.en: Cloudy days reduce output 10–25%. Gujarat's 300+ annual sunny days ensure great output. On-grid uses grid backup; hybrid has battery. Net metering covers rainy periods.

a.gu: ના! Waterproof sealants + professional mounts. RCC, Metal, Terracotta — ત્રણ types. 1–3 days install, zero damage guarantee.
a.en: No! Waterproof sealants & professional mountings. RCC, metal, terracotta — all roof types. 1–3 day install with zero damage guarantee.

a.gu: Bidirectional meter — extra solar ગ્રિડ export, credit ₹1.5–3/unit. Night/cloud import. Net bill ₹0–200 possible. Skylar India full setup.
a.en: Bidirectional meter exports extra solar to grid (credit ₹1.5–3/unit). Import at night/cloudy. Net bill can be near zero. Skylar India handles full net metering setup.

a.gu: ખેડા HQ — ખેડા, આણંદ, નડિયાદ, Petlad, Borsad, Kapadvanj, Mahudha, Thasra — full ખેડા District & surrounding areas.
a.en: Headquartered in Kheda — serving Kheda, Anand, Nadiad, Petlad, Borsad, Kapadvanj, Mahudha, Thasra and the entire Kheda District.
